title: Aigostar Smart WiFi Glass Panel Heater, Alexa Heating Control - 1500W Ultra-Thin Space Heater, Wall Mount or Floor Use, Quiet Touch Control with Timer & Eco Mode for Bedroom/Office - Holly Smart
features: 【Rapid Whole-Room Warmth with 99% Efficiency】- Experience energy-smart heating that envelops your entire space. Our advanced convection technology delivers 1500W of powerful, consistent warmth with 99% electrical-to-heat conversion—no oil or intermediaries. Activate ECO mode to intelligently drop to 750W, reducing energy use without sacrificing comfort

【3-Way Smart Control: App, Voice & Touch】 - Command your comfort from anywhere. Adjust settings via the sleek touch panel, the AIGOSMART app for remote scheduling and pre-heating, or simple voice commands through Alexa or Google Assistant. True smart-home integration puts total climate control in your hands—or just your voice

【Zero Noise, Zero Oxygen Consumption Design】 - Enjoy undisturbed quiet. The fanless heating system ensures pure silence for focused work or deep sleep, while advanced safety engineering guarantees no oxygen depletion or air dryness—just clean, peaceful warmth that cares for your well-being

【Flexible Wall & Floor Placement in Minutes】 - Style and function united. Freestanding on smooth-rolling casters or securely wall-mounted to save space, this heater adapts to your room’s layout. All mounting hardware is included, offering tool-free setup and seamless integration into your home or office

【Intuitive LED Touch Display with Full Visibility】 - Stay precisely in control. The crystal-clear touchscreen and ambient sensor let you monitor room temperature in real time, while one-touch adjustments for mode, timer, child lock, and display brightness deliver a seamless, user-friendly experience day or night
